name: uart_tx
core_function: UART transmitter that accepts a byte or stream word and emits start, data, and stop bits on a
algorithm: Use a baud/prescale counter plus a bit counter; do not derive a separate generated clock for
structure: Latch input data only when valid and ready are both true.
Use a prescale counter to hold each serial bit for an exact number of clocks.
Keep tx high during reset and idle to match UART line convention.
Expose busy separately from ready so software/testbench can observe frame progress.
